---
title: "SLAM Glucose Trajectory Analysis"
author: "William Mueller"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  input_dir: "../02_model/output/test_local.yaml"
---


```{r packages, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(lcmm)
library(future)
library(helphlme)


# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results = "asis")
```

```{r read input yaml}
# for the case when we are not running with RStudio
if (!exists("params")) {
  params <- list()
  params$input_dir <- "../02_model/output/test_local.yaml"
}

input <- yaml::read_yaml(file = params$input_dir)
```

```{r load models}
cf_path <- file.path(input$working_dir, input$cf_path)
models_path <- file.path(input$working_dir, input$models_path)
datasets_path <- file.path(input$working_dir, input$datasets_path)

load(file = cf_path)
load(file = models_path)
load(file = datasets_path)
```

```{r group models into lists}
cf$final_model <- models

cf <- as.data.frame(cf)

number_of_datasets <- length(unique(cf$data_id_no))
cf_nest <- list(data_id_no = unique(cf$data_id_no))

cf_nest$data <- lapply(seq_len(number_of_datasets), function(i) {
  row_index <- cf$data_id_no == i
  cf[row_index, ]
})
```

```{r step1 mo_eval output, include = TRUE, fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
for (i in seq_len(number_of_datasets)) {
  data_id <- unique(cf_nest$data[[i]]$data)
  cat("\n\n", data_id, "\n\n")
  models <- cf_nest$data[[i]]$final_model
  mo_eval <- helphlme::compare_models(models)
  table <- kableExtra::kable(mo_eval$table, caption = names(models))
  table <- kableExtra::kable_styling(table, "striped", full_width = FALSE)
  print(table)
  print(mo_eval$plot + labs(title = names(models)))
}
```

```{r model eval, include = TRUE, results = 'asis'}
for (i in seq_len(number_of_datasets)) {
  cf <- cf_nest$data[[i]]
  dataset_id_no <- cf_nest$data_id_no[[i]]
  dataset <- datasets[[dataset_id_no]]

  data_id <- dataset$data_id
  header <- paste("Data ID =", data_id, sep = " ")
  cat("\n\n#### ", header, "\n\n")

  df <- dataset$data
  age_vars <- as.character(dataset$age_var)
  fixcov_names <- dataset$model$fixcov
  fixcov <- rep(0, length(fixcov_names))
  names(fixcov) <- fixcov_names

  pred <- helphlme::create_pred_df(
    df = df,
    age_vars = age_vars,
    fixcov = fixcov
  )

  age_var <- age_vars[[1]]
  outcome <- dataset$outcome
  ylim <- c(min(df[[outcome]]), max(df[[outcome]]))
  helphlme::display_classes(
    df = pred,
    x = cf$final_model[[1]],
    age = age_var,
    main = header,
    xlab = age_var,
    ylab = outcome,
    ylim = ylim
  )

  mo_eval <- helphlme::compare_models(cf$final_model)
  table <- kableExtra::kable(mo_eval$table)
  table <- kableExtra::kable_styling(table, "striped", full_width = FALSE)
  print(table)
  print(mo_eval$plot)
}
```

```{r select model in nest}
final_models <- data.frame()
for (i in seq_len(nrow(cf_nest))) {
  age_var <- cf_nest$`$age_var`[[i]]
  data_oc <- cf_nest$`data|oc`[[i]]
  cf <- cf_nest$data[[i]]
  data_id <- cf$data[[1]]
  models <- cf$final_model
  mo_eval_table <- helphlme::compare_models(models)$table
  cf <- cbind(cf, mo_eval_table) %>%
    mutate(smallest_greater_5 = ifelse(`Smallest Class (%)` >= 5, 1, 0)) %>%
    arrange(-smallest_greater_5, eval(as.symbol("BIC")))
  final_model_df_row <- as.data.frame(cf)[1, ]
  final_model_df_row$dummy <- list(datasets[[data_id]]$dummy)
  final_model_df_row$fixcov <- list(datasets[[data_id]]$model$fixcov)
  final_model_df_row$data_id <- datasets[[data_id]]$data_id
  final_model_df_row$data_age_vars <- list(datasets[[data_id]]$age_var)
  final_model_df_row$age_var <- age_var
  final_model_df_row$data_oc <- data_oc
  final_model_df_row$model_name <- paste(data_oc, age_var, sep = "_")

  # we want to add labels as well from datasets
  final_model_df_row$oc_name <- datasets[[data_id]]$labels$oc_name
  final_model_df_row$oc_units <- datasets[[data_id]]$labels$oc_units
  which_age_var <- which(datasets[[data_id]]$age_var %in% final_model_df_row$age_var)
  final_model_df_row$age_var_name <- datasets[[data_id]]$labels$age_var_name[[which_age_var]]
  final_model_df_row$age_var_units <- datasets[[data_id]]$labels$age_var_units[[which_age_var]]
  final_model_df_row$data_name <- datasets[[data_id]]$labels$data_name
  final_models <- rbind(final_models, final_model_df_row)
}
```

```{r create final model csv}
final_model_csv <- final_models %>%
  select(
    model_name, everything(), -final_model,
    -dummy, -fixcov, -data_age_vars
  )
```

```{r save final models}
output_path <- normalizePath(file.path("output", params$model_dir))

R.utils::copyDirectory(from = path, output_path)

final_model_path <- file.path(output_path, "final_models.RDATA")
datasets_path <- file.path(output_path, "datasets.RDATA")
csv_path <- file.path(output_path, "final_models.csv")

write.csv(final_model_csv, csv_path)

save(final_models, file = final_model_path)
save(datasets, file = datasets_path)
```
